cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write verbose sermon/prayer diagnostics to the BepInEx console.
cfg.everyday_is_sermon_day.name: Everyday Is Sermon Day
cfg.everyday_is_sermon_day.desc: Sermons can be held every day instead of only on the vanilla sermon day.
cfg.sermon_over_and_over.name: Sermon Over And Over
cfg.sermon_over_and_over.desc: Repeat the same sermon multiple times in one day without the usual once-per-day cooldown.
cfg.alternate_mode.name: Alternate Mode
cfg.alternate_mode.desc: Instead of a chance to destroy a prayer item on use, there's a chance to just downgrade it one tier. Softer loss, keeps your prayers usable.
cfg.no_loss_on_daily_sermons.name: No Loss On Daily Sermons
cfg.no_loss_on_daily_sermons.desc: Prayer items used on the bonus daily sermons never get lost or downgraded. Only applies when Everyday Is Sermon Day is on.
cfg.notify_on_prayer_loss.name: Notify On Prayer Loss
cfg.notify_on_prayer_loss.desc: Pop up a message when a prayer item gets lost or downgraded, so you notice it happened.
cfg.randomly_upgrade_basic_prayer.name: Randomly Upgrade Basic Prayer
cfg.randomly_upgrade_basic_prayer.desc: Give basic prayers a small chance to upgrade to a known starred version when used.
cfg.speed_up_sermon.name: Speed Up Sermon
cfg.speed_up_sermon.desc: Fast-forward the sermon sequence. Note: everything in the world runs faster while the sermon is playing out.
cfg.sermon_speed.name: Sermon Speed
cfg.sermon_speed.desc: How much faster the sermon plays. Default game speed is 1 - higher values are more aggressive.
cfg.cheat_mode.name: Cheat Mode
cfg.cheat_mode.desc: All sermons always succeed and prayer items are never consumed. Overrides every other setting.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
M3: Blimey! Losing them like I'm losing my teeth!
M4: Lady luck is not on my side today...
M5: Aw...come on man, I just crafted that one!
M7: OK, I give up, take them, take them all!
M8: Now where did I put that prayer....oh.
